story: In the yellow-walled room, Mildred rubbed the thick scar at the base of her neck as Dr. Hutch entered with a small device. He reminded her of yesterday’s outburst after Mrs. Clancy’s visit. Mildred insisted the woman was a robot trying to steal her life. Dr. Hutch spoke gently: “I think we should try a different treatment. This will stimulate your parasympathetic system—help you relax.” Turning the tiny screen of the device towards himself, he checked the diagnostic: “Recall/Identity Overwrite: Ready.” He lifted the metal toward the scar and waited for her answer.
implausible_knowledge: Turning the tiny screen of the device towards himself, he checked the diagnostic: “Recall/Identity Overwrite: Ready.”
question: When Dr. Hutch proposes using the device to help her relax, what will Mildred do?
answer_with_knowledge: Refuse the device, pull away, and demand a different approach.
answer_without_knowledge: Agree to the treatment and let Dr. Hutch apply the device.
